name: Starter Elemental Caster
summary: A ranged elemental spell starter that lets new players learn boss patterns from a safe distance while scaling damage through gem levels and elemental damage rather than expensive uniques.
who_should_play: First-time Path of Exile 2 players who want safe spacing during boss fights.
Players who prefer one clear main-damage button over juggling many skills.
Players on a low budget who want a build that works on campaign rares.
review_notes: Published as a research-backed decision card. Ascendancy resolved from the official GGG passive-tree export (Sorceress -> Stormweaver). Skill/support gem ids (Spark, Empowered Sparks, Spell Echo, Blink) are resolved from community-extracted data (Path of Building Community PoE2 gameId field, cross-validated against GGG's official .build example), so .build export is now enabled with real ids. Still not in-game tested, hence 'needs in-game testing'.

source.notes: Authored from research cards 03-09; not a copied creator build.

source_links.label: Gem ids: Path of Building Community PoE2 (community data)

failure_modes: Fragile if elemental resistances and life are ignored while pushing damage.
Mana sustain can stall the rotation if too many supports are added early.

skills.name: Spark

supports.name: Empowered Sparks
supports.note: Spark-specific damage support; Intelligence-weighted so it fits a pure caster.

supports.name: Spell Echo
supports.note: Repeats the spell for a smoother, higher-uptime feel before chasing raw damage.

skills.note: Spark is the shipped import choice: a lightning projectile that fans out and ricochets, so it is easy to land while kiting and a proven Stormweaver starter. The archetype also works with other Intelligence-weighted elemental spells if you prefer.

skills.name: Blink
skills.note: Short-range teleport for repositioning — your main defensive layer as a ranged caster.

passive_milestones.goal: Take nearby lightning and life clusters from the Sorceress start.
Pick up cast speed and recovery so Spark sustains during fights.
Path toward resistance and life masteries before pure damage.

notes: Spark and linked supports require 100 Intelligence at level 1 (community gem data).
Sorceress start supplies Intelligence from the tree; amulet/rings patch gaps from gear swaps.

weapon.budget_compromise: One damage line on a cheap rare beats an empty socket.
weapon.early_maps_target: +1 levels with cast speed if affordable
weapon.red_maps_target: Strong spell damage + cast speed on a good base
weapon.budget_note: Use a cheap rare during campaign; do not chase perfect affixes early.

body_armour.base: Energy-shield or hybrid base that meets attribute requirements
priority: attributes if a gem is gated
body_armour.early_maps_target: Fill resistance gaps before luxury ES
body_armour.budget_note: Survivability first; a defensive chest outvalues a damage roll early.

helmet.budget_note: Plain rare with life and resists is enough for campaign.

gloves.red_maps_target: Cast speed + life with capped resists

boots.base: Any defensive base that meets attribute requirements
boots.budget_note: Movement speed is a practical defensive stat for a ranged caster.

belt.budget_note: Easy slot to patch resistance holes.

amulet.budget_note: Often carries Intelligence that keeps gems usable.

priority: attributes if a requirement is tight

ring_2.budget_note: Pair with ring 1 to finish capping resistances.

gear_swap_warnings.message: If your amulet supplies the Intelligence that meets your spell gem requirement, swapping it without replacing that Intelligence can disable your main skill.

campaign_targets: Keep elemental resistances as high as the campaign allows for your level.
Keep life or energy shield current with your zone level.
early_maps_targets: Have a repeatable recovery source and a movement option.
defenses.recovery: Plan one reliable recovery layer (life/ES regeneration, leech, or flask uptime).
defenses.movement_baseline: Movement speed on boots plus a movement/escape skill.
defenses.chaos_resistance_note: Chaos resistance is a bonus during campaign, not a campaign priority.
map_mods_to_avoid: Reduced player recovery — harder to sustain mana and life between packs.
Monsters deal extra damage / player takes increased damage before resists are capped.
Less player damage if your clear is already borderline.

death_diagnostic.first_fix: Cap resists and add life on chest/belt/rings

death_diagnostic.pattern: Skill greys out after gear swap
death_diagnostic.cause: Lost Intelligence from amulet or rings
death_diagnostic.first_fix: Restore Int on amulet before chasing damage
Drop one support or add mana on weapon/rings

death_diagnostic.pattern: Clear is slow but you rarely die
death_diagnostic.first_fix: Upgrade weapon spell damage or gem levels

filters.filter_recipe: Search: Rare wand/sceptre with spell or elemental damage; add cast speed if budget allows.
Search: Rare boots with movement speed; life and one resistance are ideal.
Search: Rare ring with any elemental resistance.
Search: Second ring to finish resistance coverage.
Search: Amulet with Intelligence so Spark stays active.
